headline: Robinhood Faces New Kalshi Prediction Market Risks After Fox Deal
summary: Robinhood Markets (NasdaqGS:HOOD) faces fresh legal and business risk tied to its exposure to Kalshi, a prediction markets platform now under criminal and regulatory pressure in several US states. Kalshi has entered a major integration deal with Fox Corporation, pushing its data onto large media platforms while at the same time encountering state level bans and criminal charges. An upcoming key Ninth Circuit hearing could affect Kalshi's ability to operate nationally, which may have direct...
